symbols.signature: (*, relative_path: str, resolved_path: str, content_sha256: str, git_commit: str | None = None, git_status: Literal['tracked-clean', 'tracked-modified', 'untracked'], size_bytes: int, mtime_ns: int) -> None
symbols.summary: Identity of the exact script that ran, for reproducibility.

symbols.name: ShellCodeBlockBackend
symbols.summary: Run a Code Block script written as a POSIX shell script (``.sh``).

members.name: supports
members.summary: Return whether *script_path* is a shell script this backend runs.

members.name: resolve
members.summary: Resolve a POSIX shell and build the launch command and environment.

members.name: run
members.summary: Launch the shell on the script and return the finished process.

symbols.name: UnsupportedScriptExtensionError
symbols.summary: Raised when a script's file extension has no interpreter to run it.

symbols.name: allocate_port_folder
symbols.summary: Choose a unique folder for one port under *parent*, avoiding collisions.

symbols.name: build_codeblock_provenance_payload
symbols.signature: (*, script: 'ScriptProvenance', interpreter: 'ResolvedInterpreter', environment: 'EnvironmentSnapshot', started_at: 'str', completed_at: 'str | None' = None, selected_capabilities: 'Mapping[str, str] | None' = None, exchange_manifest: 'Mapping[str, Any] | None' = None) -> 'dict[str, Any]'
symbols.summary: Assemble the full provenance record for a run as a JSON-ready dictionary.

symbols.name: capture_environment_snapshot
symbols.summary: Build an environment snapshot from a resolved interpreter.

symbols.name: capture_script_provenance
symbols.summary: Record a script's identity: its content hash, git state, and metadata.

symbols.name: codeblock_config_payload
symbols.summary: Extract just the saved Code Block settings from a raw config mapping.

symbols.name: codeblock_exchange_env
symbols.summary: Build the ``SCISTUDIO_*`` environment variables a script uses to find its files.

symbols.name: collect_codeblock_outputs
symbols.summary: Read the script's output files back into typed collections.

symbols.name: create_codeblock_exchange_layout
symbols.summary: Work out (and optionally create) the folders for one Code Block run.

symbols.name: discover_declared_outputs
symbols.summary: Scan the output folders for the files the script wrote.

symbols.name: ensure_codeblock_backends_loaded
symbols.summary: Import the built-in backend modules once so they self-register.

symbols.name: initialise_exchange_manifest
symbols.summary: Create a folder for every declared port and return a starting manifest.

symbols.name: introspect_script
symbols.summary: Read a script's structure without running it.

symbols.name: list_codeblock_backends
symbols.summary: Return every currently registered interpreter backend.

symbols.name: normalise_extension
symbols.summary: Clean up a file extension into a consistent ``.lowercase`` form.

symbols.name: plan_input_filenames
symbols.summary: Pick a unique filename for each input object on one port.

symbols.name: prepare_codeblock_exchange
symbols.signature: (inputs: 'Mapping[str, DataObject | Collection]', port_configs: 'Sequence[CodeBlockExchangePort]', *, exchange_root: 'Path', block_id: 'str', run_id: 'str', materialise_adapter: 'MaterialiseAdapter', block_slug: 'str' = 'codeblock') -> 'CodeBlockExchangeManifest'
symbols.summary: Lay out the run's folders and write the declared inputs to files.

symbols.name: register_codeblock_backend
symbols.summary: Add an interpreter backend to the in-process Code Block registry.

symbols.name: resolve_codeblock_backend
symbols.summary: Pick the registered backend that can run a given script.

symbols.name: resolve_codeblock_data_type
symbols.summary: Look up a core data-type name and return its class.

symbols.name: resolve_script_interpreter
symbols.signature: (script_path: 'Path', *, environment_config: 'Mapping[str, Any] | None' = None, project_dir: 'Path', mode: 'InterpreterMode' = 'auto', interpreter_path: 'Path | str | None' = None) -> 'ResolvedInterpreter'
symbols.summary: Choose the Python interpreter command to run a ``.py`` script.

symbols.name: run_codeblock_process
symbols.signature: (*, argv: 'Sequence[str]', cwd: 'Path', env_delta: 'Mapping[str, str]', timeout_seconds: 'float | None') -> 'subprocess.CompletedProcess[str]'
symbols.summary: Launch an interpreter as a subprocess and capture its output.

symbols.name: safe_exchange_name
symbols.summary: Turn a free-form name into a single safe folder/file name component.

symbols.name: selected_codeblock_capabilities
symbols.summary: List the save/load handler chosen for each port, where one is pinned.

symbols.name: unregister_codeblock_backend
symbols.summary: Remove a previously registered backend by its name.

symbols.name: utc_now_iso
symbols.summary: Return the current UTC time as an ISO-8601 string with second precision.

symbols.name: validate_codeblock_config
symbols.summary: Check a saved Code Block configuration and return any problems found.

symbols.name: EnvelopeKind
symbols.summary: The display kind a `PreviewEnvelope` declares for its payload.

symbols.name: FrontendManifest
symbols.signature: (previewer_id: 'str', module_url: 'str', export_name: 'str' = 'default', css: 'tuple[str, ...]' = (), version: 'str' = '0', api_version: 'str' = '1', asset_root: 'str | None' = None) -> None
symbols.summary: Describes the same-origin UI bundle a previewer ships for the frontend.

members.name: to_dict
members.summary: Return the wire-shape dict sent to the frontend (``asset_root`` is omitted).

symbols.name: OwnerKind
symbols.summary: Where a previewer came from; sets how strongly it wins when routing.

symbols.name: PREVIEWER_API_VERSION
symbols.summary: str(object='') -> str

symbols.name: PreviewEnvelope
symbols.signature: (previewer_id: 'str', target: 'PreviewTarget', kind: 'EnvelopeKind', payload: 'dict[str, Any]' = <factory>, session_id: 'str | None' = None, resources: 'tuple[PreviewResource, ...]' = (), metadata: 'PreviewMetadata' = <factory>, diagnostics: 'tuple[str, ...]' = (), error: 'PreviewErrorInfo | None' = None, frontend_manifest: 'FrontendManifest | None' = None) -> None
symbols.summary: The backend's complete response describing one preview.

members.name: to_dict
members.summary: Return a JSON-safe dict of the whole envelope for the API/wire.

members.name: with_session
members.summary: Return a copy bound to *session_id*.

symbols.name: PreviewError
symbols.summary: Base class for typed preview errors — catch this in a provider.

members.name: to_error_info
members.summary: Convert this error into a `PreviewErrorInfo` for an envelope.

symbols.name: PreviewErrorCode
symbols.summary: Stable, machine-readable codes describing why a preview failed.

symbols.name: PreviewErrorInfo
symbols.summary: The typed error payload embedded in a failed envelope.

members.name: to_dict
members.summary: Return a JSON-safe dict of the error payload.

symbols.name: PreviewLimits
symbols.summary: The bounded-read budgets applied to a preview session.

members.name: to_dict
members.summary: Return a JSON-safe dict of the budgets.

symbols.name: PreviewMetadata
symbols.signature: (sampled: 'bool' = False, truncated: 'bool' = False, cached: 'bool' = False, derived: 'bool' = False, complete: 'bool' = True, failed: 'bool' = False, extra: 'dict[str, Any]' = <factory>) -> None
symbols.summary: Display and state flags carried by every preview envelope.

members.name: to_dict
members.summary: Return the flags plus ``extra`` flattened into one JSON-safe dict.

symbols.name: PreviewRequest
symbols.signature: (target: 'PreviewTarget', spec: 'PreviewerSpec', query: 'dict[str, Any]', data_access: 'PreviewDataAccess', limits: 'PreviewLimits', session_id: 'str | None' = None, storage: 'StorageReference | None' = None, record_metadata: 'dict[str, Any]' = <factory>) -> None
symbols.summary: Everything a provider receives when it is asked to render a preview.

symbols.name: PreviewResource
symbols.signature: (resource_id: 'str', kind: 'str', media_type: 'str | None' = None, description: 'str' = '', params: 'dict[str, Any]' = <factory>) -> None
symbols.summary: Describes a bounded follow-up read a preview offers (a session resource).

members.name: to_dict
members.summary: Return a JSON-safe dict of the resource descriptor.

symbols.name: PreviewSource
symbols.signature: (workflow_id: 'str | None' = None, node_id: 'str | None' = None, output_port: 'str | None' = None) -> None
symbols.summary: Optional workflow/node/output identity shown alongside a preview.

members.name: to_dict
members.summary: Return a JSON-safe dict of all three identity fields.

symbols.name: PreviewTarget
symbols.signature: (kind: 'TargetKind', ref: 'str', recorded_type: 'str' = '', type_chain: 'tuple[str, ...]' = (), collection_item_type: 'str | None' = None, source: 'PreviewSource | None' = None) -> None
symbols.summary: Identifies the thing a previewer is asked to render.

members.name: is_collection
members.summary: Whether this target points at a collection (``kind`` is ``collection_ref``).

members.name: to_dict
members.summary: Return a JSON-safe dict of the target for the API/wire payload.

symbols.name: PreviewerEntryPoint
symbols.summary: The callable a package wires to the ``scistudio.previewers`` entry point.

symbols.name: PreviewerSpec
symbols.signature: (previewer_id: 'str', owner_kind: 'OwnerKind', owner_name: 'str', target_type: 'str', supports_collection: 'bool' = False, priority: 'int' = 0, capabilities: 'tuple[str, ...]' = (), backend_provider: 'PreviewProvider | str | None' = None, resource_provider: 'PreviewResourceProvider | str | None' = None, frontend_manifest: 'FrontendManifest | None' = None, api_version: 'str' = '1') -> None
symbols.summary: Declares one preview provider and how the router should choose it.

members.name: to_dict
members.summary: Return a JSON-safe dict of the spec (providers shown by name).

symbols.name: PreviewerSpecList
symbols.summary: Built-in mutable sequence.

symbols.name: ProviderError
symbols.summary: Raise this from a provider for a hard failure it cannot recover from.

symbols.name: TargetKind
symbols.summary: The kind of thing a `PreviewTarget` points at.

symbols.name: ArrayPlane
symbols.signature: (shape: 'list[int]', axes: 'list[str]', dtype: 'str', slice_axis_name: 'str | None', slice_axis_size: 'int | None', slice_index: 'int | None', slice_axes: 'list[SliceAxis]', matrix: 'list[list[float | None]]', vmin: 'float | None', vmax: 'float | None', truncated: 'bool', ndim: 'int') -> None
symbols.summary: A bounded 2-D plane sliced out of an N-D array, with axis metadata.

symbols.name: ArrayTile
symbols.summary: A bounded rectangular tile read out of a 2-D array plane.

symbols.signature: (path: 'str', mime_type: 'str', size_bytes: 'int', data_uri: 'str | None' = None) -> None
symbols.summary: Bounded metadata about an opaque artifact, with no full read.

symbols.name: CollectionSample
symbols.signature: (count: 'int', item_type: 'str | None', items: 'list[dict[str, Any]]', sampled: 'bool') -> None
symbols.summary: A bounded sample of a collection's items.

symbols.name: CompositeSlots
symbols.summary: The slot inventory of a composite target, with no child rendered.

symbols.name: DataFramePage
symbols.signature: (columns: 'list[str]', rows: 'list[dict[str, Any]]', total_rows: 'int', page: 'int', page_size: 'int', total_pages: 'int', sort_by: 'str | None', sort_dir: 'str | None', truncated: 'bool') -> None
symbols.summary: One bounded page of a table, returned by `PreviewDataAccess.dataframe_page`.

symbols.name: PreviewDataAccess
symbols.signature: (*, max_rows: 'int' = 200, max_bytes: 'int' = 8388608, max_items: 'int' = 100, max_tile: 'int' = 256, max_dim: 'int' = 256, text_chars: 'int' = 5000, series_points: 'int' = 256) -> 'None'
symbols.summary: The bounded reader a provider uses for every payload read.

members.name: dataframe_page
members.signature: (self, ref: 'StorageReference', *, page: 'int' = 1, page_size: 'int' = 50, sort_by: 'str | None' = None, sort_dir: 'str' = 'asc') -> 'DataFramePage'
members.summary: Return one bounded, optionally sorted page of a CSV/Parquet table.

members.name: table_xy_points

members.summary: Return all finite x/y points from two Parquet table columns.

members.signature: (self, ref: 'StorageReference', *, slice_index: 'int' = 0, axis_indices: 'dict[int, int] | None' = None) -> 'ArrayPlane'
members.summary: Return array shape/axes metadata plus one bounded, downsampled 2-D plane.

members.name: array_tile
members.signature: (self, ref: 'StorageReference', *, slice_index: 'int' = 0, y0: 'int' = 0, x0: 'int' = 0, height: 'int | None' = None, width: 'int | None' = None) -> 'ArrayTile'
members.summary: Read one bounded rectangular tile from a 2-D plane.

members.summary: Return the complete set of chart points for a Series.

members.name: text_chunk
members.summary: Return a bounded chunk of text plus a truncation marker.

members.summary: Return bounded artifact metadata, inlining a small image as a data URI.

members.summary: Return a composite's slot inventory without rendering any child.

members.summary: Resolve the storage reference for one slot of a composite target.

members.summary: Bounded read of a composite's raster slot subdirectory, if present.

members.name: collection_sample
members.summary: Return a bounded sample of a collection's item references.

symbols.name: SeriesPoints
symbols.summary: The complete finite set of (x, y) chart points for a Series preview.
